visual_description: An overhead view shows a dimly lit, cluttered room filled with debris and furniture, where a figure stands near a table holding a glowing object beside a stone statue. Close-up shots reveal a man with round glasses and a woman with red hair, both displaying surprised expressions with open mouths. Finally, a man walks away through a narrow passage lined with leaning picture frames as Chinese subtitles appear at the bottom.
audio_description: A male voice shouts angrily, evident from the Chinese subtitle. The ambient sounds of the cluttered room are audible.
